title: RNA/DNA extraction from plankton natural samples using NucleoSpin RNA + RNA/DNA Buffer kits (Macherey Nagel)
author: Sarah Romac

steps_raw.instruction: Lyse your plankton filter samples following the protocol : https://www.protocols.io/edit/cryogrinding-protocol-mecanic-lysis-of-142mm-filte-beqpjdvn

Depending of the plankton size fraction samples you have, select : 1 - RNA/DNA extraction using NucleoSpin RNA MIDI kit regarding [>20µ] size fractions (samples collected and prefiltered using a plankton net) ; 2 - RNA/DNA extraction using NucleoSpin RNA MIDI and MINI kits regarding [<20µ] size fractions (samples collected using NIskin bottles or pumping and filtered on 142mm filters) ; 3 - RNA/DNA extraction using NucleoSpin RNA MINI kits regarding [<20µ] size fractions (samples collected using NIskin bottles or pumping and filtered on 47mm filters) ;

In the Falcon50 tube containing the filter powder, add 3.6 mL of RA1 and 36 µL of β-mercaptoethanol per sample. Vortex thoroughly. Incubate at room temperature for about 5 minutes. 00:05:00 Room temperature

In the Falcon50 tube containing the filter powder, add 500µL of RA1 and 5µL of β-mercaptoethanol per sample. Vortex thoroughly. Incubate at room temperature for about 5 minutes. 00:05:00 Room temperature
Transfer the lysate and the filter on a Nucleospin Filter (violet ring) (from NucleoSpin RNA Mini kit) placed in a Collection Tube 2mL. Centrifuge 1 min at 11000g at 19°C. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute
Discard the Nucleospin Filter. Transfer the eluate in a new sterile microtube 2mL. Volume is around 550 µL .
Add 700µL EtOH 70% to the filtrate and pipette up and down at least 5 times to mix. Volume is around 1250 µL .

Transfer 600µL from the lysate/ethanol-mix in a NucleoSpin RNA column (light blue ring) placed in a Collection Tube. (from NucleoSpin RNA Mini kit) Centrifuge 30s at 11000g at 19°C. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Discard flow through and replace the NucleoSpin RNA column on the Collection Tube.
Repeat Step 7 until all the volume lysate/ethanol-mix have been passed through the NucleoSpin RNA column (light blue ring).
Add 500µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column. Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute Discard the flow-through and reuse Collection Tube;

Add again 500µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column. Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute Discard the flow-through and place the Column in a 1.5mL sterile microtube correctly annotated (Sample code, DNA extraction date, operator).
Let dry the column for 3min at room temperature. 00:03:00 Room temperature

Add 100µL DNA Elute (preheated to 50°C ) directly onto the membrane and incubate 1 min at room temperature. 00:01:00 Room temperature Centrifuge 1min at 11000g; 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute Place the NucleoSpin RNA MINI column into ta new 15mL Collection tube for the following DNA digestion (see Step 14).
Store DNA extracts at -20°C. 100 µL -20 °C

Prepare DNase mix : 90µL Reaction Buffer for DNase + 10µL reconstituted rDNase per sample and mix gently. - for 10 samples: 900µl + 10µl ; - for 17 samples: 1530µl + 170µl ; Apply 95µL DNase Mix directly onto the center of the column and incubate 15 min at room temperature. 00:15:00 Room temperature
Add 200µL RAW2 (inactivation of the rDNase). Incubate at room temperature for 1min. Centrifuge 30s at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Place the Column into a new Collection Tube.
Add 600µL RA3. Centrifuge 30s at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Discard flow-through and replace the column into the Collection Tube.

Add 250µL RA3. Centrifuge 2min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 2 minutes Discard flow-through and place the Column in a sterile microtube correctly annotated (Sample code, DNA extraction date, operator).
Add 30µL RNase-free water (preheated to 50°C) directly onto the membrane . Incubate 1min at room temperature. 00:01:00 Room temperature Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute
Repeat step 18 by eluting with the same eluate. Discard the NucleoSpin RNA MINI column.
Store RNA extracts at -80°C.
Transfer the lysate and the filter on a Nucleospin Filter placed in a Collection Tube 15 mL. (from NucleoSpin RNA MIDI kit) Centrifuge 10 min at 4500g at 19°C 4500 x g, 19 °C, 10 minutes
Discard the Nucleospin Filter. Transfer the eluate in a new sterile Falcon15mL tube. Volume is around 3.7 mL .
Add 4 mL EtOH 70% to the filtrate and and vortex 2 x 5 sec to mix. Volume is around 7.7 mL .

Transfer 3 mL from the lysate/ethanol-mix in a NucleoSpin RNA MIDI column placed in a Collection Tube 15mL. (from NucleoSpin RNA MIDI kit) Centrifuge 3min at 4500g at 19°C. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes Discard flow through and replace the NucleoSpin RNA MIDI column on the Collection Tube.
Repeat Step 7 until all the volume lysate/ethanol-mix have been passed through the NucleoSpin RNAMDI column.
Add 2.5mL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA MDI column. Centrifuge 3min at 4500g at 19°C. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes Discard the flow-through and reuse Collection Tube;
Add again 2.5mL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column. Centrifuge 3min at 4500g at 19°C. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes Discard the flow-through and place the Column in a new sterile Falcon15mL.
Let dry the column for 5min at room temperature. 00:05:00 Room temperature

Add 300µL DNA Elute (preheated to 50°C ) directly onto the membrane and incubate 5 min at room temperature. 00:05:00 Room temperature Centrifuge 3min at 11000g; 11000 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes Place the NucleoSpin RNA MIDI column into ta new 15mL Collection tube for the following DNA digestion (see Step 14).
Transfer the DNA extract on a sterile 1.5mL sterile microtube correctly annotated (Sample code, DNA extraction date, operator). Store DNA extracts at -20°C.

Prepare DNase mix : 235µL Reaction Buffer for DNase + 25µL reconstituted rDNase per sample and mix gently. - for 10 samples: 2350µl + 250µl ; - for 17 samples: 3995µl + 425µl ; Apply 235µL DNase Mix directly onto the center of the column and incubate 15 min at room temperature. 00:15:00 Room temperature
Add 2.6mL RAW2 (inactivation of the rDNase). Incubate at room temperature for 1min. Centrifuge 3min at 4500g. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes Place the Column into a new Collection Tube.
Centrifuge 3minmin at 454500g. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes PlaPce the ColCmn into a na newCollection Tube.
Add 2.6mL RA3. Centrifuge 5min at 4500g. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 5 minutes Discard flow-through and place the NucleoSpin RNA MIDI column into ta new Falcon 15mL tube.
Add 300µL RNase-free water (preheated to 50°C) directly onto the membrane . Incubate 2min at room temperature. 00:02:00 Room temperature Centrifuge 3min at 4500g. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes
Repeat step 18 by eluting with the same eluate. Discard the NucleoSpin RNA MIDI column.
Transfer the RNA extract on a sterile 1.5mL sterile microtube correctly annotated (Sample code, RNA extraction date, operator). Store RNA extract at -80°C.

In the Falcon50 tube containing the filter powder, add 3.6 mL of RA1 and 36 µL of β-mercaptoethanol per sample. Vortex thoroughly. Incubate at room temperature for about 5 minutes. 00:05:00 Room temperature
Transfer the lysate and the filter on a Nucleospin Filter placed in a Collection Tube 15 mL. (from NucleoSpin RNA MIDI kit) Centrifuge 10 min at 4500g at 19°C 4500 x g, 19 °C, 10 minutes
Discard the Nucleospin Filter. Transfer the eluate in a new sterile Falcon15mL tube. Volume is around 3.7 mL .
Add 4 mL EtOH 70% to the filtrate and and vortex 2 x 5 sec to mix. Volume is around 7.7 mL .

Transfer 600µL from the lysate/ethanol-mix in a NucleoSpin RNA column (light blue ring) placed in a Collection Tube. (from NucleoSpin RNA Mini kit) Centrifuge 30s at 11000g at 19°C. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Discard flow through and replace the NucleoSpin RNA column on the Collection Tube.
Repeat Step 7 until all the volume lysate/ethanol-mix have been passed through the NucleoSpin RNA column (light blue ring).
Add 600µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column. Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute Discard the flow-through and reuse Collection Tube;
Add again 600µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column. Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute
Let dry the column for 3min at room temperature. 00:03:00 Room temperature

Add 100µL DNA Elute (preheated to 50°C ) directly onto the membrane and incubate 2 min at room temperature. 00:02:00 Room temperature Centrifuge 1min at 11000g; 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute Place the NucleoSpin RNA MINI column into ta new 2mL Collection tube for the following DNA digestion (see Step 15).
Take an aliquot of 5µL for quantification (Qubit, Bioanalyzer, and Nanodrop). Store DNA extracts at -20°C. 100 µL -20 °C

Prepare DNase mix : 90µL Reaction Buffer for DNase + 10µL reconstituted rDNase per sample and mix gently. - for 10 samples: 900µl + 10µl ; - for 17 samples: 1530µl + 170µl ; Apply 95µL DNase Mix directly onto the center of the column and incubate 15 min at room temperature. 00:15:00 Room temperature
Add 200µL RAW2 (inactivation of the rDNase). Incubate at room temperature for 1min. Centrifuge 30s at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Place the Column into a new Collection Tube.
Add 600µL RA3. Centrifuge 30s at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Discard flow-through and replace the column into the Collection Tube.
Add 600µL ETOH 96-100%. Centrifuge 30s at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Discard flow-through and replace the column into the Collection Tube.
Add 30µL RNase-free water (preheated to 50°C) directly onto the membrane . Incubate 2min at room temperature. 00:02:00 Room temperature Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute
Repeat step 21 by eluting with the same eluate. Discard the NucleoSpin RNA MINI column.
Process directly to the TurboDNase treatment (Turbo-DNA free TM kit, Ambion AM1907).

Add again 600µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column. Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute Discard the flow-through and place the Column in a 1.5mL sterile microtube correctly annotated (Sample code, DNA extraction date, operator).
Add 600µL RA3. Centrifuge 30s at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Discard flow-through and replace the column into the Collection Tube.
Centrifuge 2min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 2 minutes Discard flow-through and place the Column in a 1.5mL sterile microtube correctly annotated (Sample code, RNA extraction date, operator).
